_comment: Soft twist: linear-falloff Rotate with RY=30°. Top row spins 30°, bottom row stays. modo_method=analytical because MODO 9 headless `xfrm.rotate angle` doApply produces nonsense (per-vert Y values shift off original rows; documented in tools/modo_diff/probe_twist.py and modo_dump.py:run_xfrm_rotate). The MODO side computes the analytical formula in Python; vibe3d runs through its actual MoveTool/RotateTool tool path. They should bit-match.
